evaluation.comments: Manual content review only: inspected local ignored model output, prompt trace, provider response metadata, and source excerpt for source grounding, research usefulness, hallucination / unsupported claims, abstraction quality, and negative-result value. The review passed as proposal-only research utility: span hints were mostly specific, unsupported-claim reports separated promotional claims from source-grounded claims, and the output was usable for comparing future methods. Remaining limitations are missing context from the excerpt boundary and some over-compression of teacher intent into broad method notes. Raw source text and raw model output are not committed. This review is not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, graduation, or architecture.
